final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial macro photo of a single water droplet on a grass blade, designed as a mobile phone wallpaper.

Style/medium: extreme close-up macro photography, photorealistic, in the spirit of Levon Biss micro-world imagery
Composition: tight vertical frame centered on one large water droplet, surrounding grass blades and smaller dew drops softly framing the subject, shallow depth of field
Subject: a single spherical water droplet with a crisp inverted reflection of the surrounding greenery visible inside, surface tension clearly rendered, translucent and glass-like
Scene/backdrop: dewy grass tips in soft morning light, background fully dissolved into circular bokeh orbs
Lighting/mood: soft diffused natural light, cool-to-warm gradient suggesting early morning, gentle and wonder-filled atmosphere
Color palette: deep emerald and sage greens as base, translucent crystal water as focal anchor, warm golden bokeh circles as accent
Materials/textures: smooth liquid surface with visible surface tension curve, fine grass fiber texture on blades, micro water film on leaf edges
Avoid: artificial studio look, over-saturated neon tones, flat lighting, deformed droplet shape, watermark
